channel.title: Adan Silva's Website
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Adan Silva's Website

item.title: Home
item.description: Adan Silva - Cybersecurity Student Introduction My name is Adan Silva.

item.title: Hack the Box: Machine Writeups
item.description: Machines Cap Conversor Expressway Facts GoodGames Jerry Nibbles Pterodactyl Sau Soulmate WingData.

item.title: Hack the Box: Sherlock Writeups
item.description: BFT Brutus Heartbreaker i-like-to Jingle Bell Litter Lockpick LogJammer Meerkat Nubilum2 PhishNet Pikaptcha Recollection RogueOne RomCom SalineBreeze-1 Tracer Ultimatum Unit42.

item.title: Hack the Box: Starting Point Writeups
item.description: Appointment Archetype Base Bike Crocodile Dancing Explosion Fawn Funnel Ignition Included Markup Meow Mongod Oopsie Pennyworth Preignition Redeemer Responder Sequel Synced Tactics Three Unified Vaccine.

item.title: Cap
item.description: Flags User 34034a18a7503210fe0cd579e9fdbef3 Root 3122db1f342573ed0d1913013d512e05 Notes First, a rustscan: rustscan --ulimit 5000 --addresses "10.129.2.14" --top -- -sC -sV We can see that 3 TCP ports are open: 21, 22, 80 Navigating to the website, we are given a dashboard to work with.

item.title: Conversor
item.description: Flags User 8af5ff977387ef463e5e60aed2fc9b4e Root 04538c593f836e7b9f8b1db1bfd1059a Notes First, let’s do a scan rustscan --ulimit 5000 --addresses "10.129.14.15" --top -- -sC -sV We get an SSH server and a web server that forwards to conversor.htb PORT STATE SERVICE REASON VERSION 22/tcp op...
